texto: The private things of lifewhat you do when eyes are averted, curtains are drawn shut, the expected are delayed, wife and kids vacate for leisurely merriments, when doors are latched, your eyes are held captive, ‘priority’ beckons, and ‘the’ perverse emerges…..Tantamount to accountability is transparency which tends toward freedom!…. what you do in private is who you really are!
explicacao: Citação de roy valenzuela sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The private things of lifewhat you do when eyes are averted, curtains are drawn shut, the expecte…” articula reflexao, reflection, private em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
